Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0971 "ENDLESSFORMSMOSTBEAUTFUL-C000-0971" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Endless Forms Most Beautiful v1.3 (2019).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C000 to setup the correct VICII display settings before starting the game Notes: 1. Patched the JSR $09BE call at $6637 to JSR $09FB instead to remove high-score saving to disk 2. To dump the game, set a breakpoint at $0971 after the loading screen is displayed
